title: Harissa Spicy Lime Leaf Stir-Fry
description: A bitter, dense Thai dish featuring harissa spice and reduced for a keto-friendly twist, perfect for those with heavy heads.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup chicken stock
ingredients.notes: Use water or low-sodium broth for keto-friendly option

ingredients.name: Juice of 2 limes
ingredients.notes: Fresh is best for optimal flavor

ingredients.name: 10 fresh Thai basil leaves
ingredients.notes: Add at the end to avoid wilting

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons harissa paste
ingredients.notes: Use a keto-friendly version if available

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup shredded carrots (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add some crunch and sweetness

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef, cook until browned, breaking it into small pieces as needed. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same skillet, sauté minced garlic for about 1 minute.
Reduce heat to low, add harissa paste and stir to combine with garlic.
Return cooked beef to the skillet along with any remaining juices. Stir in lime juice and carrots (if using).
Cover the pan and simmer for another 5-7 minutes until vegetables are slightly tender.
Stir in Thai basil leaves. Cover again and cook just a few more seconds to wilt the basil.
Remove from heat immediately, as overcooking will cause loss of vibrant color and flavor.
